observed_amnesia_evidence: [GT] multiple '[Older tool result cleared to save context]' markers exist in this session's own history — earlier tool outputs were evicted from working context mid-session

governance_rules.R1: Mechanical preflight before any emission (pine_preflight.py PASS attached)
governance_rules.R2: Error→taxonomy lookup with rule-ID receipt before any patch
governance_rules.R3: IRTS Phase 1.5: human confirms/corrects OBS table before synthesis (image=truth)
governance_rules.R4: Human compile/verify gate between build pieces (no stacking on unverified slabs)
governance_rules.R5: No verification claim without attached mechanical artifact (anti-fabrication)
